overview: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras), established in 1959, is a premier engineering and research institute in India. Known for its academic rigor, innovation ecosystem, and research leadership, IIT Madras ranks consistently among the top engineering institutions in India.
accreditation: Recognized as an Institute of National Importance by the Government of India. Accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA).

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions are through JEE Advanced based on All India Rank. Postgraduate programs require GATE, CAT, CEED, or HSEE depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: JEE Advanced usually in May-June; GATE in February. Refer to the official website for real-time updates.

campus.specialNote: The IIT Madras campus is set within a natural forest reserve and is home to diverse flora and fauna.

contact.address: Indian Institute of Technology Madras, Chennai - 600036, Tamil Nadu, India
